title: carya villosa
intro: Carya villosa, also known as the smooth shagbark hickory, is a deciduous tree species native to North America. The smooth shagbark hickory has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. It has been used to treat various health issues, such as digestive problems, fever reduction, and pain relief, due to its ability to reduce inflammation and improve cardiovascular health. Herbal preparations of Carya villosa include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
